purpose: Define how maintained L2 scenario seed cards, including owner-promoted Dune lineage cards, become root fixture candidates without implying CanonRec promotion or CloudBank runtime wiring.
out_of_scope: copying ignored HTML/PDF source files into root Git

aurora-cloudbank-symbolic-main.gate: explicit nested runtime task and validation required

selection_rules: Start from fixture_ready_shortlist entries sorted by score descending.
Prefer entries with value_lanes containing runtime_fixture for executable fixture candidates.
Block or mark manual_review when normalized fusion or wiring references contain unresolved_id.
Use setting-neutral abstractions; remove source-franchise proper-noun lore before fixture emission.
The owner-promoted Dune lineage cards SCN-0103/0105/0106/0107/0108 are maintained root catalog entries; include them in Dune thematic fixture batches while preserving v0.2.2 provenance.
Do not treat root fixture candidacy as CanonRec canon promotion or CloudBank runtime wiring.

generation_steps.action: Read catalog/l2_scenario_seed_catalog.json and select maintained cards only.
Use normalized_support_structures; fail closed on unresolved_id, manual_review on id_label_conflict.
Map objective/opposition/pressure/ethical_hook/end_states into root watch-scenario overlay tasks and L3 audit prompt.
Assert output path stays under root catalog or reports and does not write nested repo paths.
Write a root receipt with source card ids, unresolved references, and explicit non-promotion status.

first_fixture_candidates.handle: The One vs the Many Selves

validation_rules: SCN-0903, SCN-0708, and SCN-0805 have fixture_blueprint.fixture_status == ready_candidate.
Every fixture task source points back to catalog/l2_scenario_seed_catalog.json.
No contract output path targets GUMAS_SIM_2.5/Aurora_Sim_Architecture/aurora-cloudbank-symbolic-main or GUMAS_SIM_2.5/CanonRec.
SCN-0208 remains unresolved until a source card is found or the SCN-0407 wiring link is revised by owner decision.
Catalog has 92 maintained cards and zero backup_only lineage cards after owner override.
Dune thematic coverage lane includes maintained SCN-0101, SCN-0102, SCN-0103, SCN-0104, SCN-0105, SCN-0106, SCN-0107, and SCN-0108.
SCN-0103/0105/0106/0107/0108 preserve source_version v0.2.2 and source_status lineage_only_missing_from_v0_2_15.

thematic_coverage_lanes.fixture_generation_rule: All available SCN-010x Dune-derived cards are maintained root catalog entries and eligible for root fixture candidates; v0.2.2 cards retain source provenance.
